metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_2096
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig.1B-F: "Scribble1 Interacts with the PDZ Binding Domain of the GluN2A and GluN2B Subunits"

Fig1. I-K: "The Spatio temporal Localization of Scribble1 Matches that of NMDARs"
Using postembedding immunogold electron microscopy, we showed that Scrib1 is localized with NMDARs postsynaptically at excitatory synapses in the stratum radiatum of the CA1 region of the hippocampus (Figures 1I-1K and S1A-S1G; Scrib1: 5 nm gold particles and GluN1: 15 nm gold particles).

11/12/2017 Pim
- Based on the interaction with membrane associated proteins NR2A and NR2B, the "extrinsic component of ... membrane" term was chosen.. Experimental description: "All rats were Sprague-Dawley between embryonic day 18 (E18) and 10 weeks old at the time of experiments. R"
